title: New look UI: Workspace Filter Button
excerpt: With the new UI rolled out, the filtering button for Workspaces is hidden unless you hover over the search bar. Why make an essential feature hidden when it wasn’t before? Use case: Our company is still in the introducto…

posts.author: pgaree (Paige Garee)
posts.cookedHtml: With the new UI rolled out, the filtering button for Workspaces is hidden unless you hover over the search bar. Why make an essential feature hidden when it wasn’t before? Use case: Our company is still in the introductory phase of implementing Monday.com to our workforce (large fenestration company). We need to introduce Monday to all levels of team members, some who will find a large learning curve when trying to navigate Monday. We have hundreds of boards and unfortunately cannot control the boards that are now “main” instead of “private” without a ton of time and resources spent reaching out to each individual board owner, so this feature is truly essential. I ask that this feature not be hidden and simply show inside the search bar, I’m flummoxed as to why this was done in the first place. Why do I need to see the extra empty space in the search bar instead of this pain-alleviating feature?
